case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. THE TIRE & AUTO PARTS STORE,INC.DBA PORTER'S TIRE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED OCT-20-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE TIRE & AUTO PARTS STORE,INC.DBA PORTER'S TIRE AND AUTO

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $303.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT THE TIRE & AUTO PARTS STORE,INC.DBA PORTER'S TIRE AND AUTO PORTER, DOUG

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE TIRE & AUTO PARTS STORE,INC.DBA PORTER'S TIRE AND AUTO PORTER, DOUG POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: MTS 5100 ENGINE ANALYZER KIT; SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGHT RE: MERCHANDISE, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $14,757.24 DAMAGES, $1,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $453.50 COSTS, $234.32 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,270.06, PROPERTY MARKET VALUE $3300.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE CONTRACT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES ONE THROUGH TEN,INCLUSIVE

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT THE TIRE & AUTO PARTS STORE,INC.DBA PORTER'S TIRE AND AUTO PORTER, DOUG DOES ONE THROUGH TEN,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-27-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-28-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-12-2006
